mapper.select: SELECT a.chnl_id, a.chnl_disp_nm, a.renew_track_cnt, a.renew_dtime, a.chnl_nm, a.track_cnt, a.create_dtime, a.update_dtime, d.track_id, d.track_nm, d.agency_id, d.album_id, d.reprsnt_artist_id, d.create_dtime trackCreateDtime, d.update_dtime trackUpdateDtime, c.create_dtime trackRenewDtime, c.track_sn FROM tb_chnl a INNER JOIN tb_map_chnl_track c ON a.chnl_id = c.chnl_id AND a.disp_status_type = 'Y' INNER JOIN tb_track d ON c.track_id = d.track_id AND d.disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN d.disp_start_dtime AND d.disp_end_dtime WHERE a.chnl_id = #{channelId} ORDER BY c.track_sn ASC

SELECT a.chnl_id, a.chnl_disp_nm, a.renew_track_cnt, a.renew_dtime, a.chnl_nm, a.track_cnt, a.create_dtime, a.update_dtime, d.track_id, d.track_nm, d.agency_id, d.album_id, h.artist_id, h.artist_nm, f.album_img_size as size, f.album_img_url as url, d.reprsnt_artist_id, d.create_dtime trackCreateDtime, d.update_dtime trackUpdateDtime, c.create_dtime trackRenewDtime, c.track_sn, d.svc_streaming_yn, d.svc_drm_yn, d.free_yn FROM tb_chnl a INNER JOIN tb_map_chnl_track c ON a.chnl_id = c.chnl_id AND a.disp_status_type = 'Y' INNER JOIN tb_track d ON c.track_id = d.track_id AND d.disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN d.disp_start_dtime AND d.disp_end_dtime INNER JOIN ted_album e ON d.album_id = e.album_id AND e.disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN e.disp_start_dtime AND e.disp_end_dtime LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_album_img f ON e.album_id = f.album_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_trackartist g ON d.track_id = g.track_id AND g.rp_yn = 'Y' LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_artist h ON g.artist_id = h.artist_id WHERE a.chnl_id IN
#{channelId}
AND a.disp_status_type = 'Y'
ORDER BY c.track_sn ASC

SELECT c.chnl_id, c.chnl_nm, c.chnl_disp_nm, c.update_dtime, d.album_img_size AS img_size, d.album_img_url AS img_url, chnl_img.img_url AS channel_image_url FROM (SELECT a.chnl_id, a.chnl_nm, a.chnl_disp_nm, a.update_dtime, b.album_id FROM tb_chnl a INNER JOIN ted_album b ON a.album_id = b.album_id AND b.disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND NOW() BETWEEN b.disp_start_dtime AND b.disp_end_dtime WHERE a.disp_status_type = 'Y' AND a.chnl_type = 'FLAC' ORDER BY a.update_dtime DESC LIMIT 1) c LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_album_img d ON c.album_id = d.album_id LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_chnl_img chnl_img ON c.chnl_id = chnl_img.chnl_id AND chnl_img.chnl_img_type = 'PANNEL'

SELECT a.chnl_id, a.chnl_nm, a.chnl_disp_nm, a.track_id, a.track_nm, f.artist_id reqArtistId, f.artist_nm reqArtsitNm, a.agency_id, b.album_id, e.artist_id, e.artist_nm, c.album_img_size AS size, c.album_img_url AS url, g.img_url AS signImgUrl, 600 AS signImgSize, a.create_dtime, a.update_dtime, a.track_cnt trackCount, a.img_size, a.img_url, a.track_sn, a.title_yn, a.renew_track_cnt, a.renew_dtime, a.trackCreateDtime, a.trackUpdateDtime, a.trackRenewDtime, a.svc_streaming_yn, a.svc_drm_yn, a.free_yn, a.rank FROM (SELECT a.chnl_id, a.chnl_nm, a.chnl_disp_nm, a.renew_track_cnt, a.renew_dtime, a.track_id, a.track_nm, a.agency_id, a.album_id, a.create_dtime, a.update_dtime, a.track_cnt, a.track_sn, a.reprsnt_artist_id, a.img_size, a.img_url, a.trackCreateDtime trackCreateDtime, a.trackUpdateDtime trackUpdateDtime, a.trackRenewDtime trackRenewDtime, a.title_yn, a.svc_streaming_yn, a.svc_drm_yn, a.free_yn, @curRank:=IF(@prevChnlId = a.chnl_id, @curRank + 1, 1) AS rank, @prevChnlId:=a.chnl_id FROM (SELECT chnl.chnl_id, chnl.renew_track_cnt, chnl.renew_dtime, chnl.chnl_nm, chnl.chnl_disp_nm, chnl.track_cnt, chnl.create_dtime, chnl.update_dtime, chnl.img_url, chnl.img_size, c.track_id, c.track_nm, c.agency_id, c.album_id, c.reprsnt_artist_id, c.create_dtime trackCreateDtime, c.update_dtime trackUpdateDtime, b.create_dtime trackRenewDtime, b.track_sn, b.title_yn, c.svc_streaming_yn, c.svc_drm_yn, c.free_yn FROM (SELECT g.*, IF(h.img_url IS NULL, '', h.img_url) AS img_url, '600' AS img_size FROM tb_character a INNER JOIN tb_aflo_character b ON a.character_no = b.character_no AND b.expire_dtime >= NOW() AND a.character_no = #{characterNo} INNER JOIN tb_aflo c ON b.vas_id = c.vas_id AND c.del_yn = 'N' AND NOW() BETWEEN c.svc_start_dtime AND c.svc_end_dtime INNER JOIN tb_aflo_artist e ON c.aflo_id = e.aflo_id INNER JOIN tb_aflo_chnl f ON e.aflo_artist_id = f.aflo_artist_id INNER JOIN tb_chnl g ON f.chnl_id = g.chnl_id INNER JOIN tb_chnl_img h ON g.chnl_id = h.chnl_id AND h.chnl_img_type = 'PANNEL' AND g.chnl_type = 'AFLO' AND g.disp_status_type = 'Y' ) chnl INNER JOIN tb_map_chnl_track b ON chnl.chnl_id = b.chnl_id INNER JOIN tb_track c ON b.track_id = c.track_id AND c.disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND NOW() BETWEEN c.disp_start_dtime AND c.disp_end_dtime ORDER BY chnl.create_dtime DESC , b.track_sn ASC ) a ) a INNER JOIN ted_album b ON a.album_id = b.album_id AND b.disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND NOW() BETWEEN b.disp_start_dtime AND b.disp_end_dtime LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_album_img c ON b.album_id = c.album_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_trackartist d ON a.track_id = d.track_id AND d.rp_yn = 'Y' LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_artist e ON d.artist_id = e.artist_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_artist f ON f.artist_id = a.reprsnt_artist_id LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_chnl_img g ON a.chnl_id = g.chnl_id AND g.chnl_img_type = 'ADD' WHERE a.rank <= 10

SELECT chnl_id FROM tb_chnl A WHERE a.disp_status_type = 'Y' AND a.chnl_type = 'FLAC'
ORDER BY A.create_dtime desc
LIMIT 1

SELECT b.chnl_id FROM (SELECT b.music_content_id, b.disp_sn, c.chnl_id, c.category_id FROM tb_chart a INNER JOIN tb_chart_music_content b ON a.chart_id = b.chart_id INNER JOIN tb_map_category_chnl c ON b.music_content_id = c.chnl_id INNER JOIN tb_category d ON c.category_id = d.category_id WHERE a.chart_type = 'WEEKLY' AND a.svc_content_type = 'ALL' AND a.music_content_type = 'CHNL' GROUP BY b.music_content_id ORDER BY b.disp_sn) a INNER JOIN tb_chnl b ON a.music_content_id = b.chnl_id WHERE b.disp_status_type = 'Y' AND category_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY category_id ORDER BY disp_sn

SELECT a.svc_genre_id, a.prefer_genre_id, b.chart_id, c.music_content_id chnl_id, c.disp_sn FROM ( SELECT prefer_genre_id, svc_genre_id, @curRank:=IF(@prevChnlId = prefer_genre_id, @curRank + 1, 1) AS rank, @prevChnlId:=prefer_genre_id FROM tb_map_prefer_genre_svc_genre, (SELECT @curRank:=0, @prevChnlId:=0) r ORDER BY prefer_genre_id , disp_sn ) a INNER JOIN tb_chart b ON a.svc_genre_id = b.svc_content_id INNER JOIN tb_chart_music_content c ON b.chart_id = c.chart_id INNER JOIN tb_chnl e ON e.chnl_id = c.music_content_id INNER JOIN tb_map_svc_genre_chnl f ON e.chnl_id = f.chnl_id WHERE b.chart_type = 'WEEKLY' AND b.svc_content_type = 'GENRE' AND b.music_content_type = 'CHNL' AND e.disp_status_type = 'Y' AND a.rank <= 1 GROUP BY a.svc_genre_id , a.prefer_genre_id , b.chart_id ,e.chnl_id, c.disp_sn ORDER BY b.chart_id , c.disp_sn

SELECT category.category_id, b.music_content_id chnl_id, b.disp_sn FROM tb_category category INNER JOIN tb_chart a ON category.category_id = a.svc_content_id INNER JOIN tb_chart_music_content b ON a.chart_id = b.chart_id INNER JOIN tb_chnl c ON b.music_content_id = c.chnl_id INNER JOIN tb_map_category_chnl d ON c.chnl_id = d.chnl_id WHERE a.chart_type = 'WEEKLY' AND a.svc_content_type = 'MOOD' AND a.music_content_type = 'CHNL' AND c.disp_status_type = 'Y' AND category.category_type = 'MOOD' AND category.disp_status_type = 'Y' GROUP BY category.category_id , a.chart_id, b.disp_sn ORDER BY a.chart_id , b.disp_sn

( SELECT CONCAT(a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id) as listen_id, a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id, b.member_chnl_nm as content_title, b.track_cnt as track_count, a.last_listen_dtime, d.album_img_size as size, d.album_img_url AS url FROM ( SELECT listen_type, listen_type_id, character_no, last_listen_dtime FROM tb_member_last_listen_hist WHERE member_no = #{memberNo} AND character_no = #{characterNo} AND listen_type IN ('MY_CHNL', 'CHNL', 'ALBUM', 'ARTIST', 'CHART', 'RC_SML_TR', 'RC_GR_TR', 'RC_ATST_TR', 'RC_CF_TR', 'FLAC', 'AFLO') ORDER BY last_listen_dtime DESC LIMIT 300 ) a JOIN tb_member_chnl b ON a.listen_type_id = b.member_chnl_id AND a.character_no = b.character_no AND a.listen_type = 'MY_CHNL' JOIN ted_album c ON b.album_id = c.album_id AND c.disp_status_yn= 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN c.disp_start_dtime AND c.disp_end_dtime LEFT JOIN tb_album_img d ON c.album_id = d.album_id )
UNION ALL
( SELECT CONCAT(a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id) AS listen_id, a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id, c.prefer_disp_nm AS content_title, b.music_content_cnt AS track_count, a.last_listen_dtime, d.img_size, d.img_url AS url FROM ( SELECT listen_type, listen_type_id, last_listen_dtime FROM tb_member_last_listen_hist WHERE member_no = #{memberNo} AND character_no = #{characterNo} AND listen_type IN ('MY_CHNL', 'CHNL', 'ALBUM', 'ARTIST', 'CHART', 'RC_SML_TR', 'RC_GR_TR', 'RC_ATST_TR', 'RC_CF_TR', 'FLAC', 'AFLO') ORDER BY last_listen_dtime DESC LIMIT 300 ) a JOIN ( SELECT chart_id, music_content_cnt FROM tb_chart WHERE (svc_content_type,chart_type) IN (('ALL', 'HOURLY'), ('KIDS','DAILY')) AND music_content_type = 'TRACK' ) b ON a.listen_type_id = b.chart_id AND a.listen_type = 'CHART' JOIN tb_prefer_disp c ON b.chart_id = c.disp_id JOIN ( SELECT img_content_id, img_size, img_url, create_dtime FROM tb_img_mang WHERE img_content_type = 'DISP' AND img_disp_type = 'RCT_DTL' AND os_type IN ('ALL', #{osType}) ) d ON c.prefer_disp_id = d.img_content_id )
UNION ALL ( SELECT CONCAT(a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id) AS listen_id, a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id, b.chart_nm AS content_title, b.music_content_cnt AS track_count, a.last_listen_dtime, d.img_size, d.img_url AS url FROM ( SELECT listen_type, listen_type_id, last_listen_dtime FROM tb_member_last_listen_hist WHERE member_no = #{memberNo} AND character_no = #{characterNo} AND listen_type = 'CHART' ORDER BY last_listen_dtime DESC LIMIT 300 ) a JOIN ( SELECT chart_id, chart_nm, music_content_cnt FROM tb_chart WHERE (svc_content_type,chart_type) = ('ALL', 'NOTABLE') AND music_content_type = 'TRACK' ) b ON a.listen_type_id = b.chart_id AND a.listen_type = 'CHART' JOIN ( SELECT img_content_id, img_size, img_url, create_dtime FROM tb_img_mang WHERE img_content_type = 'NOTABLE' AND img_disp_type = 'RCT_DTL' AND os_type IN ('ALL', #{osType})) d ) UNION ALL ( SELECT CONCAT(a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id) AS listen_id, a.listen_type AS listen_type, a.listen_type_id AS listen_type_id, b.chart_nm AS content_title, b.music_content_cnt AS track_count, a.last_listen_dtime AS last_listen_dtime, d.img_size AS size, d.img_url AS url FROM ( SELECT listen_type, listen_type_id, last_listen_dtime FROM tb_member_last_listen_hist WHERE member_no = #{memberNo} AND character_no = #{characterNo} AND listen_type = 'CHART' ORDER BY last_listen_dtime DESC LIMIT 300 ) a JOIN ( SELECT chart_id, chart_nm, music_content_cnt FROM tb_chart WHERE chart_type = 'MANAGED' AND svc_content_type = 'GENRE' AND svc_content_id = 13 ) b ON a.listen_type_id = b.chart_id AND a.listen_type = 'CHART' JOIN ( SELECT img_content_id, img_size, img_url, create_dtime FROM tb_img_mang WHERE img_content_type = 'ISNS_CHART' AND img_disp_type = 'RCT_DTL' AND os_type IN ('ALL', #{osType})) d ) union all ( SELECT CONCAT(a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id) AS listen_id, a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id, b.artist_nm as content_title, COUNT(DISTINCT e.track_id) AS track_count, a.last_listen_dtime, c.size, c.url AS url FROM ( SELECT listen_type, listen_type_id, last_listen_dtime FROM tb_member_last_listen_hist WHERE member_no = #{memberNo} AND character_no = #{characterNo} AND listen_type IN ('MY_CHNL', 'CHNL', 'ALBUM', 'ARTIST', 'CHART', 'RC_SML_TR', 'RC_GR_TR', 'RC_ATST_TR', 'RC_CF_TR', 'FLAC', 'AFLO') ORDER BY last_listen_dtime DESC LIMIT 20 ) a JOIN ted_artist b ON a.listen_type_id = b.artist_id AND a.listen_type = 'ARTIST' LEFT JOIN ted_artistimage c ON b.artist_id = c.artist_id JOIN ted_trackartist d ON b.artist_id = d.artist_id JOIN tb_track e ON d.track_id = e.track_id AND e.disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN e.disp_start_dtime AND e.disp_end_dtime JOIN ted_album f ON e.album_id = f.album_id AND f.disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN f.disp_start_dtime AND f.disp_end_dtime AND f.album_tp IN ('RL','SL','EP','OS','LV','RM','SP','DS','BS','MF') GROUP BY CONCAT(a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id), a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id, b.artist_nm, a.last_listen_dtime, c.size, c.url )
UNION ALL
( SELECT CONCAT(a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id) AS listen_id, a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id, b.chart_nm AS content_title, b.music_content_cnt AS track_count, a.last_listen_dtime, c.img_size, c.img_url AS url FROM ( SELECT listen_type, listen_type_id, last_listen_dtime FROM tb_member_last_listen_hist WHERE member_no = #{memberNo} AND character_no = #{characterNo} AND listen_type IN ('MY_CHNL', 'CHNL', 'ALBUM', 'ARTIST', 'CHART', 'RC_SML_TR', 'RC_GR_TR', 'RC_ATST_TR', 'RC_CF_TR', 'FLAC', 'AFLO') ORDER BY last_listen_dtime DESC LIMIT 300 ) a JOIN ( SELECT chart_id, svc_content_id, chart_nm, music_content_cnt, CASE WHEN chart_type = 'NEW' THEN 'RECENT' WHEN chart_type = 'DAILY' THEN 'POPULARITY' ELSE NULL END AS chart_type FROM tb_chart t WHERE svc_content_type = 'GENRE' AND music_content_type = 'TRACK' AND chart_type IN ('NEW','DAILY') ) b ON a.listen_type_id = b.chart_id AND a.listen_type = 'CHART' JOIN ( SELECT img_content_id, img_size, img_url, shortcut_type, create_dtime FROM tb_img_mang WHERE img_content_type = 'GENRE' AND img_disp_type = 'RCT_DTL' AND shortcut_type IN ('RECENT','POPULARITY') AND os_type IN ('ALL', #{osType}) ) c ON b.svc_content_id = c.img_content_id AND b.chart_type = c.shortcut_type )
UNION ALL
( SELECT CONCAT(a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id) AS listen_id, a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id, CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(b.disp_std_start_dt, '%c월 %e일'), ' 오늘의 추천') AS content_title, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_rcmmd_similar_track_list aa JOIN tb_track bb ON bb.track_id = aa.track_id AND bb.disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN bb.disp_start_dtime AND bb.disp_end_dtime WHERE aa.rcmmd_similar_track_id = b.rcmmd_similar_track_id) AS track_count, a.last_listen_dtime, c.img_size AS size, c.img_url AS url FROM ( SELECT listen_type, listen_type_id, character_no, last_listen_dtime, create_dtime FROM tb_member_last_listen_hist WHERE member_no = #{memberNo} AND character_no = #{characterNo} AND listen_type IN ('MY_CHNL', 'CHNL', 'ALBUM', 'ARTIST', 'CHART', 'RC_SML_TR', 'RC_GR_TR', 'RC_ATST_TR', 'RC_CF_TR', 'FLAC', 'AFLO') ORDER BY last_listen_dtime DESC LIMIT 300 ) a JOIN tb_rcmmd_similar_track b ON a.listen_type_id = b.rcmmd_similar_track_id AND a.character_no = b.character_no AND a.listen_type = 'RC_SML_TR' LEFT JOIN ( SELECT img_size, img_url, create_dtime, disp_sn, CASE dfk_type WHEN 'MON' THEN 0 WHEN 'TUE' THEN 1 WHEN 'WED' THEN 2 WHEN 'THU' THEN 3 WHEN 'FRI' THEN 4 WHEN 'SAT' THEN 5 WHEN 'SUN' THEN 6 END AS dfk_type FROM tb_rcmmd_img_mang WHERE rcmmd_type_id = 'RC_SML_TR' AND img_disp_type = 'RCT_DTL' AND os_type IN ('ALL', #{osType}) ) c ON b.disp_sn = c.disp_sn AND WEEKDAY(b.create_dtime) = c.dfk_type )
UNION ALL
( SELECT CONCAT(a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id) AS listen_id, a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id, CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(b.disp_std_start_dt, '%c월 %e일'), ' 오늘의 추천') AS content_title, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track_list aa JOIN tb_track b ON aa.track_id = b.track_id AND b.disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN b.disp_start_dtime AND b.disp_end_dtime WHERE aa.rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track_id = b.rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track_id ) AS track_count, a.last_listen_dtime, c.img_size, c.img_url AS url FROM ( SELECT listen_type, listen_type_id, character_no, last_listen_dtime, create_dtime FROM tb_member_last_listen_hist WHERE member_no = #{memberNo} AND character_no = #{characterNo} AND listen_type IN ('MY_CHNL', 'CHNL', 'ALBUM', 'ARTIST', 'CHART', 'RC_SML_TR', 'RC_GR_TR', 'RC_ATST_TR', 'RC_CF_TR', 'FLAC', 'AFLO') ORDER BY last_listen_dtime DESC LIMIT 300 ) a JOIN tb_rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track b ON a.listen_type_id = b.rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track_id AND a.character_no = b.character_no AND a.listen_type = 'RC_GR_TR' JOIN ( SELECT img_content_id, img_size, img_url, create_dtime, CASE dfk_type WHEN 'MON' THEN 0 WHEN 'TUE' THEN 1 WHEN 'WED' THEN 2 WHEN 'THU' THEN 3 WHEN 'FRI' THEN 4 WHEN 'SAT' THEN 5 WHEN 'SUN' THEN 6 END AS dfk_type FROM tb_map_img_rcmmd_img WHERE img_content_type = 'GENRE' AND rcmmd_type_id = 'RC_GR_TR' AND img_disp_type = 'RCT_DTL' AND os_type IN ('ALL', #{osType}) ) c ON b.svc_genre_id = c.img_content_id AND WEEKDAY(b.create_dtime) = c.dfk_type )
UNION ALL
( SELECT CONCAT(a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id) AS listen_id, a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id, CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(b.disp_std_start_dt, '%c월 %e일'), ' 좋아할만한 아티스트 MIX') AS content_title, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_rcmmd_artist_track_list WHERE rcmmd_artist_id = b.rcmmd_artist_id) AS track_count, a.last_listen_dtime, c.img_size, c.img_url AS url FROM ( SELECT listen_type, listen_type_id, character_no, last_listen_dtime, create_dtime FROM tb_member_last_listen_hist WHERE member_no = #{memberNo} AND character_no = #{characterNo} AND listen_type IN ('MY_CHNL', 'CHNL', 'ALBUM', 'ARTIST', 'CHART', 'RC_SML_TR', 'RC_GR_TR', 'RC_ATST_TR', 'RC_CF_TR', 'FLAC', 'AFLO') ORDER BY last_listen_dtime DESC LIMIT 300 ) a JOIN tb_rcmmd_artist b ON a.listen_type_id = b.rcmmd_artist_id AND a.character_no = b.character_no AND a.listen_type = 'RC_ATST_TR' LEFT JOIN (SELECT img_size, img_url, create_dtime FROM tb_rcmmd_img_mang WHERE rcmmd_type_id = 'RC_ATST_TR' AND img_disp_type = 'RCT_DTL' AND os_type IN ('ALL', #{osType}) LIMIT 1 ) c ON 1=1 )
UNION ALL
( SELECT CONCAT(a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id) AS listen_id, a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id, CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(b.disp_std_start_dt, '%c월 %e일'), ' 나를 위한 새로운 발견') AS content_title, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_rcmmd_mforu_list aa JOIN tb_track bb ON aa.track_id = bb.track_id AND bb.disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN bb.disp_start_dtime AND bb.disp_end_dtime WHERE aa.rcmmd_mforu_id = b.rcmmd_mforu_id) AS track_count, a.last_listen_dtime, c.img_size AS size, c.img_url AS url FROM ( SELECT listen_type, listen_type_id, character_no, last_listen_dtime, create_dtime FROM tb_member_last_listen_hist WHERE member_no = #{memberNo} AND character_no = #{characterNo} AND listen_type IN ('MY_CHNL', 'CHNL', 'ALBUM', 'ARTIST', 'CHART', 'RC_SML_TR', 'RC_GR_TR', 'RC_ATST_TR', 'RC_CF_TR', 'FLAC', 'AFLO') ORDER BY last_listen_dtime DESC LIMIT 300 ) a JOIN tb_rcmmd_mforu b ON a.listen_type_id = b.rcmmd_mforu_id AND a.character_no = b.character_no AND a.listen_type = 'RC_CF_TR' JOIN ( SELECT img_content_id, img_size, img_url, create_dtime FROM tb_map_img_rcmmd_img WHERE img_content_type = 'GENRE' AND rcmmd_type_id = 'RC_CF_TR' AND img_disp_type = 'RCT_DTL' AND os_type IN ('ALL', #{osType}) ) c ON b.svc_genre_id = c.img_content_id )
ORDER BY last_listen_dtime DESC

(SELECT CONCAT(a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id) as listen_id, a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id, b.chnl_nm as content_title, b.track_cnt as track_count, a.last_listen_dtime, d.album_img_size as size, d.album_img_url AS url, b.renew_track_cnt, b.renew_dtime, chnl_img.img_url AS channel_image_url FROM ( SELECT listen_type, listen_type_id, last_listen_dtime FROM tb_member_last_listen_hist WHERE member_no = #{memberNo} AND character_no = #{characterNo} AND listen_type IN ('MY_CHNL', 'CHNL', 'ALBUM', 'ARTIST', 'CHART', 'RC_SML_TR', 'RC_GR_TR', 'RC_ATST_TR', 'RC_CF_TR', 'FLAC', 'AFLO') ORDER BY last_listen_dtime DESC LIMIT 300 ) a JOIN tb_chnl b ON a.listen_type_id = b.chnl_id AND a.listen_type IN ('CHNL', 'FLAC') AND b.disp_status_type = 'Y'
AND b.chnl_type !='FLAC'
JOIN ted_album c ON b.album_id = c.album_id AND c.disp_status_yn= 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN c.disp_start_dtime AND c.disp_end_dtime LEFT JOIN tb_album_img d ON c.album_id = d.album_id LEFT JOIN tb_chnl_img chnl_img ON b.chnl_id = chnl_img.chnl_id AND chnl_img.chnl_img_type = 'PANNEL' )
UNION ALL
(SELECT CONCAT(i.listen_type, i.listen_type_id) as listen_id, i.listen_type, i.listen_type_id, g.chnl_nm as content_title, g.track_cnt as track_count, i.last_listen_dtime, 600 as size, h.img_url AS url, g.renew_track_cnt, g.renew_dtime, null as channel_image_url FROM tb_character a INNER JOIN tb_aflo_character b ON a.character_no = b.character_no AND b.expire_dtime >= NOW() AND a.character_no = #{characterNo} AND a.character_type = 'AFLO' INNER JOIN tb_aflo c ON b.sale_vas_id = c.sale_vas_id AND c.del_yn = 'N' AND NOW() BETWEEN c.svc_start_dtime AND c.svc_end_dtime INNER JOIN tb_aflo d INNER JOIN tb_aflo_artist e ON d.aflo_id = e.aflo_id AND d.del_yn = 'N' INNER JOIN tb_aflo_chnl f ON e.aflo_artist_id = f.aflo_artist_id INNER JOIN tb_chnl g ON f.chnl_id = g.chnl_id AND g.disp_status_type = 'Y' AND g.chnl_type = 'AFLO' INNER JOIN tb_chnl_img h ON g.chnl_id = h.chnl_id AND h.chnl_img_type = 'TOP_DETAIL' INNER JOIN ( SELECT listen_type, listen_type_id, last_listen_dtime FROM tb_member_last_listen_hist WHERE member_no = #{memberNo} AND character_no = #{characterNo} AND listen_type IN ('MY_CHNL', 'CHNL', 'ALBUM', 'ARTIST', 'CHART', 'RC_SML_TR', 'RC_GR_TR', 'RC_ATST_TR', 'RC_CF_TR', 'FLAC', 'AFLO') ORDER BY last_listen_dtime DESC LIMIT 300 ) i ON i.listen_type_id = g.chnl_id AND i.listen_type = 'AFLO' )

SELECT CONCAT(a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id) AS listen_id, a.listen_type, a.listen_type_id, c.prefer_disp_nm AS content_title, b.music_content_cnt AS track_count, a.last_listen_dtime ,d.img_size AS size ,d.img_url AS url FROM ( SELECT listen_type, listen_type_id, last_listen_dtime FROM tb_member_last_listen_hist WHERE member_no = #{memberNo} AND character_no = #{characterNo} AND listen_type = 'PRI_CHART' ORDER BY last_listen_dtime DESC LIMIT 300 ) a JOIN ( SELECT chart_id, music_content_cnt FROM tb_chart WHERE (svc_content_type,chart_type) IN (('ALL', 'HOURLY'), ('KIDS','DAILY'), ('GENRE', 'DAILY')) AND music_content_type = 'TRACK' ) b ON a.listen_type_id = b.chart_id JOIN tb_prefer_disp c ON b.chart_id = c.disp_id JOIN ( SELECT img_content_id, img_size, img_url, create_dtime FROM tb_img_mang WHERE img_content_type = 'MIX_CHART' AND img_disp_type = 'RCT_DTL' AND os_type IN ('ALL', #{osType}) ) d ON c.prefer_disp_id = d.img_content_id
